title: psoralea aphylla
intro: Psoralea aphylla, also known as desert heliotrope or desert bird's-climber, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psoralea aphylla include its ability to support bone health, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Psoralea aphylla include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
